title: Enterprise Operations Platform (Durbin ERP)
description: Designed and built a platform-scale enterprise solution for Fleet Telematics and Mining Safety IoT, delivering CRM, CMS, and operational modules with real-time dashboards, geospatial tracking, and complex analytics visualizations to support mission-critical workflows.

title: EEPC India
description: Completely redesigned and migrated the platform from PHP to MERN, improving Speed Index by 93.33% (9s to 0.6s) and page load time by 97%. Optimized data fetching using React Query (85% fewer API calls) and implemented secure role-based access control with JWT and HTTP-only cookies.

title: VidTube — Video Streaming App
description: Built a responsive video streaming application using the YouTube v3 API, implementing video and channel search, category-based filtering, personalized recommendations, and seamless media playback to improve content discovery.
